reviews.review_description: I came across this game through the store and it amazed me not too much to do yet (this has probably changed by now) but the owners said they will be adding horror etc. you should play! It is one of the best I’ve played go try it!

reviews.review_title: I’m not biased because I’m a mod
reviews.review_description: This is just a really great game I think it could pass big scary at one point
